materialChanges: Completed the medical-specialty claim trail by mapping it to the welcome and synthesis scenes and naming it in both learner-visible source notes.
Narrowed the cross-country training claim and related learner prose to the variation established by WPA plus one bounded United States certification and licensure example from ABPN.
Added one sentence connecting society in the lesson title to the relationship, culture, and system lenses used in the teaching map.

reviewDispositions.rationale: Added scene-welcome and scene-synthesis to claim-psychiatry-medical-specialty and added that claim ID to both scenes' source notes, using the ABPN source already present in each note.

Replaced the broad certification-and-authorization comparison with the cross-country training dimensions stated by WPA and one explicitly bounded United States certification and licensure route documented by ABPN.
The claim already identifies the WPA record as a professional position statement, states its 2023 approval and 2017 last-review date, and preserves its evidence boundary and uncertainty.

The policy-transfer assessment already distinguishes association from causation, requires revising evidence and affected-student perspectives, preserves the individual-clinical boundary, and has an aligned eight-point rubric.
The concrete fictional Noor opening precedes technical framing and still states the lesson's purpose, central several-lens relation, and learning boundary in natural learner-facing language.
The worked example already includes task representation, model selection, plan, reasoned execution, boundary conditions, an independent check, interpretation, and a self-explanation prompt.
The existing sequence already fades support from a completion prompt through a supported boundary case to a learner-generated independent problem with diagnostic feedback.
The policy item remains a genuine transfer task requiring lens selection, evidence planning, affected-student perspectives, possible harms, and a bounded individual-clinical conclusion.

Added one sentence in the opening that explains society as the broad terrain separated into relationship, culture, and system questions, preserving the syllabus-aligned title while removing the vocabulary mismatch.

evidenceChecked: All six ordered scene files use semantic Markdown source order, exactly one level-one heading, and a logical level-two and level-three hierarchy.
The lesson is text-first and untimed; tables are accompanied by prose that restates their instructional logic, and no outcome depends on color, sound, motion, hover, dragging, or position.
Prompts support typed, speech-to-text, transcribed-audio, and tutor-mediated responses while preserving the same reasoning operation and assessment criteria.
The accessibility and recovery sections provide non-punitive retry routes, no required personal disclosure, a pause-or-leave option, and a local-help boundary without presenting the lesson as care.
No third-party asset, image, audio, video, dataset, patient record, or active diagram is present; lesson.json declares an empty thirdPartyAssets array.

All scene content is inert Markdown with no raw HTML, script, style, executable notebook, remote embed, unsafe path, or active media; assessment responses are untimed and do not require a pointer gesture.

Every material claim maps to complete source records and is exposed through same-scene source notes; the revised medical-specialty mapping and narrowed training-variation claim were checked against their cited support.
references.json records allowed source types, exact locators, dated access states, use types, rights bases, rights evidence, and no human-only source.

ATTRIBUTION.md identifies the CC BY 4.0 lesson grant, exact adapted curriculum source and commit, retained material, modifications, citation-only factual sources, fictional cases, and author-agent provenance.
The finalizer checked the public WPA source and ABPN certification page against the bounded training, specialty, supervision, and United States route statements used in the revised pack.

Privacy and security boundaries are explicit: all named cases are fictional, learners are told not to borrow a real person's private experience, and real-person diagnosis, treatment direction, and ungoverned publication are excluded.
limitations: No live browser, screen-reader, keyboard, 200-percent zoom, reflow, reduced-motion, print, or export test was performed; this was a source-level accessibility audit.

The ABPN terms-of-use endpoint returned an internal error when rechecked; the audit therefore relies on the contributor's dated 2026-07-22 no-restriction-found record and the lesson's facts-only, original-expression use.

Canonical npm source preflight and repository validation were not rerun because the operator expressly prohibited npm; the candidate had passed validation and this run performed targeted structural checks on the bounded revision.
The operator supplied the COMMENTED, non-dismissed GitHub transport status for pull request 70; this run did not independently query GitHub.

rationale: The original candidate content at 78307ffcd3207ff1d9312821ac57bea8293e7050 was unchanged when the two frozen review artifacts were added. Both artifacts validate against the review schema, target lesson PSY-WEL-001 version 0.1.0 and that exact candidate, use eligible approve verdicts, cover the required academic and learning-design roles, disclose the same accountable principal, and have distinct run IDs and declared OpenAI and Google model families. On the operator-supplied record, both have equivalent non-dismissed COMMENTED transports on pull request 70; COMMENTED is an accepted founding-stage transport and is not treated as dismissal. No review was excluded. The finalizer run ID is distinct from the author and review run IDs. All nine findings are disposed above. The bounded revision completes the per-scene medical-specialty evidence trail, narrows the only overbroad cross-jurisdiction statement, and resolves the title vocabulary note without altering the lesson identity, version, status, assessment, references, glossary, attribution, or frozen reviews. The resulting lesson remains coherent, academically bounded, clinically non-authorizing, accessible through equivalent text-based routes, privacy-preserving, and rights-documented. The source-level accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied subject to its stated technical and source-access limitations. The two eligible advisory approvals satisfy the standard-lesson-v3 input gate; this is a disclosed and attested founding-stage record, not proof of independent verification or learner effectiveness. With the operator's required final-commit substitution and canonical checks before merge, no credible unresolved content blocker remains.
dissent: The learning-design review disclosed principal-level non-independence because github:VSBDev operated the authoring and review agents; founding-stage policy permits one accountable principal, but the record must not be described as verified independence.

Neither review establishes real learner outcomes, licensed-psychiatrist endorsement, or rendered assistive-technology performance; the decision rests on the structured artifacts, bounded source checks, and finalizer audit.
conditions: After committing the final lesson revision, the operator must replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with that exact 40-character commit SHA before submitting or merging the adjudication.
Strict source preflight, repository validation, and pull-request GitHub-provenance checks must pass after the finalCommit substitution and before merge.
If a fresh source-access check contradicts the dated ABPN agent-access record, publication must pause for correction or source replacement.
After adjudication, the maintainer may change only the permitted lesson status, source-confidence, and retained-claim review-status fields for publication.
